title: Cobblemore Modpack
description: A kitchensink cobblemon with exploration and player expression.
body:
A kitchen sink modpack revolving around cobblemon, it has improved exploration features, terrain gen and some mods that allow for more player expression and customisation. It's designed to be played with friends. Alongside that it also features some storage and automation aspects without going too deep into it.

I hope it has something for everyone and is enjoyable to play!
